name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
Burberry vintage series new small messenger bag! Imported vintage brown cowhide, 1.4cm thick. Imported Limonta vintage series new arrival! Top-grain leather paired with classic check pattern; the vintage brown adds an artistic touch! The check pattern is eco-friendly, easy to clean, and the bag size is suitable for daily needs. Can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody! A must-have item!
Size: 21/8.5/18cm!
